bug_report.summary: Pandoc-style fenced code block header ```{.nix} appears to trigger syntax highlighting changes (likely Nix highlighting) when it should remain unhighlighted
expected_behaviors: Pandoc-style fence header `{.nix}` should not be treated as a language selector; code block should remain with 'No highlighting' (no Nix syntax highlighting applied).
actual_behaviors: Rendering/styling differs in the `{.nix}` fence header token and within the code body (token/string coloring changes), consistent with the code block being parsed/highlighted differently (potentially as Nix) despite using Pandoc-style `{.nix}`.
